heading: Unfunded priorities of the Missile Defense Agency: annual report
label: 5513 Unfunded priorities of the Missile Defense Agency: annual report

children.heading: .—Reports
children.label: a .—Reports
children.text: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for a fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to , the Director of the Missile Defense Agency shall submit to the Secretary of Defense and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, and to the congressional defense committees, a report on the unfunded priorities of the Missile Defense Agency.section 1105 of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: A summary description of such priority, including the objectives to be achieved if such priority is funded (whether in whole or in part).

children.label: B
children.text: The additional amount of funds recommended in connection with the objectives under subparagraph (A).

children.label: i
children.text: Line Item Number (LIN) for applicable procurement accounts.

children.label: ii
children.text: Program Element (PE) number for applicable research, development, test, and evaluation accounts.

children.label: iii
children.text: Sub-activity group (SAG) for applicable operation and maintenance accounts.

children.heading: .—Prioritization of priorities
children.label: 2 .—Prioritization of priorities
children.text: Each report under subsection (a) shall present the unfunded priorities covered by such report in order of urgency of priority.
is not funded in the budget of the President for the fiscal year as submitted to Congress pursuant to , United States Code;section 1105 of title 31
is necessary to fulfill a requirement associated with an operational or contingency plan of a combatant command or other validated requirement; and

would have been recommended for funding through the budget referred to in paragraph (1) by the Director of the Missile Defense Agency in connection with the budget if additional resources had been available for the budget to fund the program, activity, or mission requirement.
